sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28261" key="drakaini/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρᾰκαινίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n28261.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δράκων</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg012:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0450.tlg001:12:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0476.tlg001:4:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mnesim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
